title: ajania kokanica
intro: Ajania kokanica, also known as Arctic chamomile or Russian tarragon, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Russia and Eastern Siberia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ajania kokanica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ajania kokanica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
